title: They Swept Your Stop. On Purpose. | R2F Trading 2026
description: POV: You enter the trade. It looks perfect. Then price hunts your stop — and THEN moves in your direction. Sound familiar? This is the Liquidity Hunt + Quality Pass Test. Smart money doesn't trade WITH you. They trade AGAINST you first. The R2F Trading system shows you how to stop being the hunted and start being the hunter. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT setups and smart money concepts breakdowns. r2ftrading.com
script: Stop. Before your next trade — check if smart money already hunted YOUR stop. POV: Your setup is perfect. You enter. Confidence is high. Then price spikes. Straight through your stop. Account down $600 in seconds. Then — price flips. Exact direction you called. But you're already out. That spike? That was the Liquidity Hunt. Smart money needed YOUR stop to fill their order. The Quality Pass Test: wait for the sweep. Wait for the FVG to form after. THEN enter. That's the real entry. The R2F Trading system teaches exactly this. Follow us. New ICT setups every single day.
